rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF JAMES JOHNSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
rulings.Rulings: Appearances: Robert Cowan appeared for Diane Bradford. Mr Cowan informs the court that he has received the checks from the insurance company. The court directs Mr Cowan to file a declaration, receipts and an inventory. The matter is continued for status to September 25, 2006 for filing of required documents. Judicial Officer: Dorothy McMath. Reporter: Tina Paxton Clerk:Rosie Noguera
